title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-29
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health metrics for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statuses in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot watering plants in a greenhouse, with Polly the bee hovering nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off a list.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
